_provenance: Distilled from broll-pipeline output/run-manifest.json as committed in the public repo (run started 2026-07-09T02:50:17.107Z, 60 logged calls). Stage costs = live spend plus original cost carried by cached artifacts. Receipt line items sum to $8.26 and reconcile line for line against the committed manifest.

receipt.atBuildNote: at-build ledger ran to about $14 incl. discarded re-rolls, score + foley experiments, and Spanish dub renders; that spend is not carried by the committed manifest

_reconciliation: Receipt lines aggregate the committed run-manifest snapshot: audio 0.28 + shots 4.40 + direction 3.50 + review 0.08 = 8.26 (artifactsTotalUsd). Build-time extras (discarded re-rolls, score/foley experiments, dub renders) were logged as they ran (~$14 at build) but are not carried by the committed manifest; the video's beat-12 receipt frame baked the at-cut manifest state ($9.51 carried) before a post-cut re-render consolidated the ledger.
